'''zhazazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okro|okro]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okro|okro]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhazazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zhæzæzhæth || zhæzæzhæj || zhæzæzhæsh || zhæzæzhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zhazazazhath || zhazazazhaj || zhazazazhash || zhazazazha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zhazazhath || zhazazhaj || zhazazhash || zhazazha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zhazafzhafth || zhazafzhafj || zhazafzhafsh || zhazafzhaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zhazazhatha || zhazazhaja || zhazazhasha || zhazazhaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || zhazazhath || zhazazhaj || zhazazhash || zhazazha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zhazazhathal || zhazazhajal || zhazazhashal || zhazazhakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zhazazhaathatha || zhazazhaajaja || zhazazhaashasha || zhazazhaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || zhazazhathan || zhazazhajan || zhazazhashan || zhazazhakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zhazazhathaoro || zhazazhajaoro || zhazazhashaoro || zhazazhakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
